name: Gearbox Design Workflow
description: Complete drivetrain design flow: from power/speed requirements to shaft sizing, bearing selection, gear ratio, and optional belt drive.

steps.label: 1. Calculate Torque
steps.description: Determine shaft torque from motor power and speed.

steps.label: 2. Size the Shaft
steps.description: Calculate minimum shaft diameter from torque and allowable stress.

steps.label: 3. Select Bearings
steps.description: Verify bearing life under the calculated shaft loads.

steps.label: 4. Design Gears
steps.description: Determine gear sizes and output torque.

steps.label: 5. Belt Drive (Optional)
steps.description: Design timing belt transmission if belt stage is needed.

steps.label: 6. Select Motor
steps.description: Match calculated power to a standard IEC motor.
